name: ASRock H810M-X WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x1 - Support DDR5-6400 - 1x M.2 Slot - USB 3.2 Gen1 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C (Front) - D-Sub - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN - 802.11ac Wi-Fi - BT 5.0
shortName: ASRock H810M-X WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe
description: ASRock micro-ATX motherboard for LGA 1851 socket supporting DDR5 with Wi-Fi 6 and comprehensive connectivity.
